title: NOVASWARM
description:
Fight. Evolve. Survive.

NOVASWARM is a fast-paced space survival roguelite where every run pushes your skills to the limit. Pilot your ship through endless waves of hostile enemies, level up, unlock devastating upgrades, and create powerful weapon combinations to stay alive.

Each run offers new upgrade choices, encouraging different builds and strategies. Adapt to the ever-growing swarm, discover powerful synergies, and see how long you can survive against overwhelming odds.

Features• 🚀 Fast-paced space combat

• ⚡ Dynamic weapon upgrades and evolution

• 🎯 Build unique loadouts every run

• 👾 Massive enemy swarms

• 🔥 Endless survival gameplay

• 🎮 Easy to learn, challenging to master

The swarm never stops growing.

How long can you survive?
description_short: A fast-paced space survival roguelite. Battle endless enemy swarms, evolve powerful weapons, create unique builds, and survive as long as you can.
